one_minute_value_explanation: v9.6 lets an operator see whether a provider-backed action is allowed to spend tokens, calls, quota, retries, or money before execution advances.
thirty_second_version_delta: v9.5 showed the failure recovery path. v9.6 adds the spend and quota gate before execution can advance.
product_review_trigger: Reopen product review if users still cannot explain whether provider execution is budget-bound or merely structurally audited.
not_proven: This delta does not prove actual provider billing correctness, quota enforcement, production execution safety, or market adoption.
